GatewayExporter - interface com.semanticwww.yesir.gateway.GatewayExporter.
A gateway exporter knows how to export forum messages to an external data source.
GatewayImporter - interface com.semanticwww.yesir.gateway.GatewayImporter.
A gateway importer knows how to import forum data from an external data source.
GatewayManager - class com.semanticwww.yesir.gateway.GatewayManager.
Manages gateways for a forum, which synchronize the forum with external data sources such as an NNTP newsgroup or email account.
GatewayManager() - Constructor for class com.semanticwww.yesir.gateway.GatewayManager

GatewayManager.GatewayImportTask - class com.semanticwww.yesir.gateway.GatewayManager.GatewayImportTask.

searchCaseSensitive - Static variable in class com.semanticwww.yesir.io.rss.rssmodel.RSSSearchPatternParser
TRUE: Pattern matches words in same case (Pattern "DoG" matches "DoG", not "dog")
FALSE: Pattern matches words in any case (Pattern "DoG" matches "dog", "dOg", ...)
searchOnlyWholeWords - Static variable in class com.semanticwww.yesir.io.rss.rssmodel.RSSSearchPatternParser
TRUE: Pattern must match a complete word (Pattern "dog" matches "dog")
FALSE: Pattern may match part of a word (Pattern "dog" matches "hotdog")
searchRegEx - Static variable in class com.semanticwww.yesir.io.rss.rssmodel.RSSSearchPatternParser
TRUE: Pattern is interpreted as a regular Expression
FALSE: Pattern is not interpreted as a regular Expression
searchResultsItemOrder - Variable in class com.semanticwww.yesir.io.rss.rssmodel.RSSChannel

searchResultsItems - Variable in class com.semanticwww.yesir.io.rss.rssmodel.RSSChannel

A class to manage the execution of tasks in the Jive system.

TaskEngine.PriorityQueue - class com.semanticwww.yesir.utils.TaskEngine.PriorityQueue.
A simple priority queue that only allows for elements with one of three priorities: TaskEngine.HIGH_PRIORITY, TaskEngine.MEDIUM_PRIORITY, and TaskEngine.LOW_PRIORITY.
